result.summary: Daily exposes a documented REST API at `https://api.daily.co/v1`, authenticated with a domain-scoped API key sent as a Bearer token.
result.description: Daily provides APIs and SDKs for building real-time video and audio features such as calls, live streaming, recording, and transcription into applications. Its platform centers on Daily domains and rooms used to host and manage meetings.

daily_api_key.label: Daily REST API key
daily_api_key.setup: Sign in to the Daily [dashboard](https://dashboard.daily.co/) and open the **Developers** section to view or regenerate your domain API key. The docs state that **domain owners** can view/regenerate it and that each key is scoped to a single Daily domain; for staging, create a separate Daily account/domain and get that account's key from the same **Developers** section as described in the [Authentication docs](https://docs.daily.co/docs/rest-api/authentication). Use it as `Authorization: Bearer <DAILY_API_KEY>`.
